subject: [PATCH v6 08/20] nfsd: use RCU to protect fi_deleg_file

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch protects the fi_deleg_file pointer in the NFS server code using RCU (Read-Copy Update) to prevent concurrent access issues during delegation teardown and lease removal. The patch annotates fi_deleg_file with __rcu, converts all accessors to use proper RCU primitives, and introduces rcu_dereference_protected() for safe dereferencing under certain conditions. This change prepares the code for a subsequent patch that will safely acquire a reference from the CB_NOTIFY callback path without holding the fi_lock lock.
